title: Janguine
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Janguine |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] that fall in grid square L-6 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. |sector=[[Halthor sector/Legends|Halthor sector]] |system=[[Janguine system/Legends|Janguine system]] |coordinates=L-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain=*Rainforests *[[Mountain/Legends|Mountains]] |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=*[[Mooloolian]]s *A [[Unidentified Janguine species|species]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language=[[Janguine (language)|Janguine]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|From Janguine?''"
"''Oh, I hardly think that likely. The jungle barbarians have not been around for more than three hundred years.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''}} '''Janguine''' was a jungle [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Its natives spoke [[Janguine (language)|Janguine]] and were overrun by the [[Mooloolian]]s around [[275 BBY]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Janguina }} [[Category:Halthor sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
